reviews.review_description: This was one of the first apps I downloaded on my Meta Quest and can truly say that I am glad this was one of my first full immersive experience with VR. Being put right in the middle of a musical performance was incredible. The sound was amazing and paired well with the performers technical precision on each instrument. Instructions were pretty straightforward as you get used to the Meta navigation tools. Overall, this was a very well made app and an amazing experience that I thoroughly enjoyed.
